notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes public battle events (龙公 entering 监天塔, 袁琼都 repairing 宿命蛊, 天庭 counterattack) that are visible to all participants. No private knowledge, secret plans, or future-known information is directly supported by the source pointers. The entities and events are all marked as 'ambiguous' visibility and describe open combat actions. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted without speculative extrapolation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily describes battlefield events (宿命蛊修复, 命败杀招, 撤退, 追击) with observable actions but no clear character motives directly supported by seed facts. Characters' actions are visible (龙公攻击方源, 方源后退, 凤九歌转化年兽) but the underlying motives are ambiguous - they could be tactical, emotional, or strategic. Per rules, when only behavior is visible and motive is ambiguous, return empty characterMotives.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily describes individual-level conflicts (龙公 vs 方源, 凤九歌 vs 方源) and the broader 天庭 vs 三域蛊仙 conflict. While 天庭 appears as a collective faction in relations and events, the seed does not provide enough concrete faction-level pressure details (interests, threats, resources, reputation, geography, succession, or inheritance) to construct a meaningful pressure candidate. The 天庭 vs 三域蛊仙 conflict is stated at a high level without specific stakes or likely reactions beyond what is already happening (天庭 advancing, 三域 retreating). No other named collective group (clan, family, shop, hall) has a concrete stake described in the seed facts.
IF export filter quarantined 6 legacy old-schema branches.
